---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, strategy, or plugin
---

Before submitting, search [existing issues](https://github.com/mrcatlait/neko-music/issues) to avoid duplicates.

## Summary

A clear, concise description of the feature.

## Scope

Where does this apply?

- [ ] Web (catalog or backstage)
- [ ] Server (API, media, backstage)
- [ ] Plugin or strategy (extensibility)
- [ ] Shared package (contracts, permissions, selectors)
- [ ] Other:

## Motivation

Why is this useful? How does it align with the project goals (user ownership, clarity over automation, manual → assisted → automated workflows)?

## Suggested Implementation

How could this be implemented? Include relevant modules, APIs, or patterns.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why is this one preferred?

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or references.
